name: Friendship Meadows Country Club
notes: REGION NOTE: Friendship Meadows is located in Pak Chong, Nakhon Ratchasima (Korat) province — NOT Kanchanaburi. It is grouped here per the original pipeline batch assignment but is geographically in the Khao Yai/Pak Chong area. Address: 20/I Moo 16, Mittraphap Road Km.162, Pak Chong, Nakhon Ratchasima 30130. Some sources list Birdie.in.th as Pak Thong Chai district. Designer 'Nelson Wright & Haworth' per AllSquareGolf — the firm is Nelson & Haworth (Neil Haworth / Bob Nelson partnership). Year 1993 per 1golf.eu. Course length: Blue 6,531 yards, White 6,090 yards, Red 5,647 yards. Green fees weekday THB 600, weekend THB 1,000 per 1golf.eu. GPS coordinates (14.7125, 101.422) from GolfShake — appear plausible for Pak Chong area; use with caution. Distance estimated from Mittraphap Rd Km 162 marker (~162 km from Bangkok). Golfshake reports NO driving range, NO clubhouse, NO buggy rentals, NO club rentals, NO bar/restaurant at the course. Caddie services listed as available on AllSquareGolf. Fax: +66 44 312 955. Sources: allsquaregolf.com, 1golf.eu, golfshake.com, birdie.in.th
